blocks.title: Sheet Form Test
blocks.subtitle: Submit this form — it writes to the spreadsheet tab named `Responses`.

blocks.title: Before testing
blocks.text: Replace `YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID` in this payload with the ID from your Sheet URL: `docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/**ID**/edit`. Also confirm the GAS project has Spreadsheet OAuth scope.

items.label: User submits
items.text: Form captures field values via FormData API

items.label: google.script.run
items.text: `a2uiSheetFormSubmit(sheet, data, spreadsheetId)` fires — no page reload

items.label: Sheet write
items.text: Server appends a row with timestamp + all field values. Creates the tab if it doesn't exist.

items.label: Feedback
items.text: Button shows ✓ Submitted on success, Retry on error with the error message
